item.title: The Popstroke Daytona Beach mega mini golf match! (Holes 28-30)
item.description: Watch holes 28–30 of a competitive mini golf match at Popstroke Daytona Beach, featuring tough layouts, precise putting, and exciting end-game moments.

media:content.media:title: The Popstroke Daytona Beach mega mini golf match! (Holes 28-30)
media:content.media:description: Watch holes 28–30 of a competitive mini golf match at Popstroke Daytona Beach, featuring tough layouts, precise putting, and exciting end-game moments.

item.title: Disney's Winter Summerland Mega Mini Golf Match! - Crazy Game!
item.description: Watch a fast-paced mini golf match at Disney’s Winter Summerland, featuring creative course designs, tricky shots, and exciting gameplay moments.

item.title: Are These The World's Biggest Mini Golf Holes?!
item.description: Explore unusually large mini golf holes and course designs, highlighting scale, creativity, and challenging putting setups.
